visuals.title: Replication in Distributed Systems
visuals.description: Animated visual covering why we replicate, consistency models, replication strategies, the CAP theorem, and conflict resolution techniques
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="replication-introduction">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- G1: Title "Replication" with underline (0.3s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Replication means maintaining copies of data across multiple nodes in a distributed system.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Replication in Distributed Systems</text>
    <line x1="100" y1="34" x2="320" y2="34" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G2: Why replicate? (1.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="We replicate data for three key reasons: fault tolerance so the system survives node failures, performance by serving reads from the nearest replica, and scalability by distributing load across nodes.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Why Replicate?</text>
    <!-- Fault Tolerance -->
    <rect x="14" y="64" width="124" height="48" rx="6" fill="#3949AB" opacity="0.9"/>
    <text x="76" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Fault Tolerance</text>
    <text x="76" y="93" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#C5CAE9">If one node fails,</text>
    <text x="76" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#C5CAE9">others serve data</text>
    <!-- Performance -->
    <rect x="148" y="64" width="124" height="48" rx="6" fill="#00695C" opacity="0.9"/>
    <text x="210" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Performance</text>
    <text x="210" y="93" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#B2DFDB">Serve from nearest</text>
    <text x="210" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#B2DFDB">replica for speed</text>
    <!-- Scalability -->
    <rect x="282" y="64" width="124" height="48" rx="6" fill="#E65100" opacity="0.9"/>
    <text x="344" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="white">Scalability</text>
    <text x="344" y="93" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFE0B2">Distribute load</text>
    <text x="344" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFE0B2">across replicas</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G3: Consistency models spectrum (3.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Consistency models form a spectrum. Strong consistency ensures all replicas see the same data at the same time. Eventual consistency allows temporary divergence but guarantees convergence. Causal consistency preserves cause-and-effect ordering.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Consistency Models (Strict to Relaxed)</text>
    <!-- Spectrum bar -->
    <rect x="30" y="138" width="360" height="10" rx="5" fill="#E0E0E0"/>
    <rect x="30" y="138" width="120" height="10" rx="5" fill="#C62828"/>
    <rect x="150" y="138" width="120" height="10" fill="#E65100"/>
    <rect x="270" y="138" width="120" height="10" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <!-- Arrow labels -->
    <text x="30" y="157" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">STRICT</text>
    <text x="390" y="157" text-anchor="end" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">RELAXED</text>
    <!-- Strong -->
    <rect x="22" y="162" width="116" height="34" rx="5" fill="#C62828" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="80" y="176" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Strong</text>
    <text x="80" y="188" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="#C62828">All see same data</text>
    <!-- Causal -->
    <rect x="152" y="162" width="116" height="34" rx="5" fill="#E65100" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="210" y="176" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Causal</text>
    <text x="210" y="188" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="#E65100">Preserves ordering</text>
    <!-- Eventual -->
    <rect x="282" y="162" width="116" height="34" rx="5" fill="#00695C" opacity="0.15"/>
    <text x="340" y="176" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Eventual</text>
    <text x="340" y="188" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7.5" fill="#00695C">Converges over time</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G4: Replication strategies (4.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Three main replication strategies exist. Primary-backup uses one leader that handles all writes. Multi-primary allows any node to accept writes. Read replicas let the primary handle writes while replicas serve read requests.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="214" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Replication Strategies</text>
    <!-- Primary-Backup -->
    <rect x="14" y="222" width="124" height="52" rx="6" fill="white" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="76" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Primary-Backup</text>
    <circle cx="56" cy="254" r="8" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="56" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="white">P</text>
    <line x1="64" y1="254" x2="74" y2="254" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="82" cy="254" r="6" fill="#C5CAE9" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="82" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="#3949AB">B</text>
    <circle cx="98" cy="254" r="6" fill="#C5CAE9" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="98" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="#3949AB">B</text>
    <text x="76" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">One leader writes</text>
    <!-- Multi-Primary -->
    <rect x="148" y="222" width="124" height="52" rx="6" fill="white" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="210" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Multi-Primary</text>
    <circle cx="190" cy="254" r="7" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="190" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="white">P</text>
    <circle cx="210" cy="254" r="7" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="210" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="white">P</text>
    <circle cx="230" cy="254" r="7" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="230" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="white">P</text>
    <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">Any can write</text>
    <!-- Read Replicas -->
    <rect x="282" y="222" width="124" height="52" rx="6" fill="white" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="344" y="237" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Read Replicas</text>
    <circle cx="320" cy="254" r="8" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="320" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="white">W</text>
    <circle cx="344" cy="254" r="6" fill="#FFE0B2" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="344" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="#E65100">R</text>
    <circle cx="362" cy="254" r="6" fill="#FFE0B2" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="362" y="257" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="5" fill="#E65100">R</text>
    <text x="344" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">Primary writes only</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G5: CAP Theorem triangle (6.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="The CAP theorem states that a distributed system can only guarantee two out of three properties: Consistency, Availability, and Partition tolerance. During a network partition, you must choose between consistency and availability.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="145" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">CAP Theorem</text>
    <!-- Triangle -->
    <polygon points="145,305 75,370 215,370" fill="none" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- C vertex -->
    <circle cx="145" cy="303" r="12" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="145" y="307" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">C</text>
    <text x="145" y="296" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Consistency</text>
    <!-- A vertex -->
    <circle cx="75" cy="372" r="12" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="75" y="376" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">A</text>
    <text x="52" y="388" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">Availability</text>
    <!-- P vertex -->
    <circle cx="215" cy="372" r="12" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="215" y="376" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="white">P</text>
    <text x="238" y="388" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">Partition Tol.</text>
    <!-- Center label -->
    <text x="145" y="350" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Pick 2</text>
    <text x="145" y="361" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">of 3</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G6: Conflict resolution (7.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="When replicas diverge, conflicts must be resolved. Last-writer-wins uses timestamps to pick the latest write. Version vectors track causal history to detect conflicts. Application-level merge lets the application define custom resolution logic.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="345" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Conflict Resolution</text>
    <!-- Last-writer-wins -->
    <rect x="268" y="302" width="154" height="24" rx="5" fill="#C62828" opacity="0.12"/>
    <circle cx="280" cy="314" r="6" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="280" y="317" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="white">1</text>
    <text x="296" y="311" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Last-Writer-Wins</text>
    <text x="296" y="322" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">Timestamp decides</text>
    <!-- Version vectors -->
    <rect x="268" y="330" width="154" height="24" rx="5" fill="#3949AB" opacity="0.12"/>
    <circle cx="280" cy="342" r="6" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="280" y="345" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="white">2</text>
    <text x="296" y="339" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Version Vectors</text>
    <text x="296" y="350" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">Track causal history</text>
    <!-- App-level merge -->
    <rect x="268" y="358" width="154" height="24" rx="5" fill="#00695C" opacity="0.12"/>
    <circle cx="280" cy="370" r="6" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="280" y="373" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="white">3</text>
    <text x="296" y="367" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">App-Level Merge</text>
    <text x="296" y="378" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#666">Custom resolution logic</text>
  </g>
</svg>
